name: stampquest
description: Collect digital stamps from places you visit and build a personal travel passport.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w server
scripts.e2e:server: npm run build -w client && rm -rf e2e/.tmp && mkdir -p e2e/.tmp && DATABASE_PATH=e2e/.tmp/e2e.db PORT=4173 GOOGLE_API_KEY= HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY= npx tsx server/src/index.ts
